name: Syncomm Technology Corp.
summary: Syncomm Technology Corp. operates as a fabless semiconductor company worldwide. It offers portable products, wireless SOC integrating audio and data processors, and wireless digital modules for use in smart TVs, computers, and mobile devices, as well as PC peripheral, console gaming, portable accessory, and home audio applications. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Hsinchu, Taiwan.
